Everything is built and running. Here's a summary of what was done:

---

**What was built:**

**labs-router** (`/mnt/data/labs-router/`) — Bun TypeScript reverse proxy on port 8083. Reads `lab.json` manifests from `/mnt/data/labs/*/` on each request (no caching, so labs auto-discover immediately). Routes `GET /` to an HTML index listing active labs; routes `GET /<name>/*` to the lab's configured local port, stripping the name prefix.
